notes: Fix: teleport handling for Assetto Corsa / ACC (back to pits, practice restarts). Aborted attempts are now discarded from the telemetry buffer and partial post-teleport runs are no longer recorded as timed laps — keeping track maps and charts clean.
notas: Fix: tratamento de teleporte no Assetto Corsa / ACC (back to pits, restart de treino). Tentativas abortadas agora são descartadas do buffer de telemetria e o trecho parcial pós-teleporte não vira mais volta cronometrada — mantendo mapas de pista e gráficos limpos.
